Taro
Plus
Tarek Career

Du:

Eingefügter Text.txt
Dokument

ChatGPT:

I have the full handover from the previous save-the-date website work and will treat this as the dedicated Tarek & Reem Wedding Website / Save-the-Date project.

The current working direction I’ll carry forward is:

  • Wedding: Thursday, 7 January 2027, Seasons Country Club, KM 28 Cairo–Alexandria Desert Road, Cairo, Egypt.

  • Website: hosted on GitHub Pages at tarek-badr.github.io/tarek-and-reem-wedding/.

  • RSVP: needs to work independently of Claude/GitHub Pages, with Formspree or the already-integrated endpoint collecting responses.

  • Visual style: elegant, romantic, Egyptian-inspired but modern and human-made; burgundy/lilac-purple family with the refined wedding palette rather than a generic template look.

  • Save-the-date QR card: “Tarek & Reem” → “Save the Date” → QR → “Scan for details and FAQs”; remove “Wedding Countdown Page.”

  • Remove the arrow beside “Keep scrolling.”

  • Dress code: your finalized wording about garden formal and avoiding white/ivory/cream/champagne/very pale shades.

  • Children: warm 12+ wording.

  • Timing: guest arrival from 2:00 PM, celebration begins shortly after.

  • Parking: simple venue-parking guidance.

  • Plus ones: only people listed on the invitation.

  • Stay section: rename to “Where should I stay?”, explaining New Cairo/New Administrative Capital versus Giza/Pyramids, with Helnan Landmark, Royal Inn Residence, Kempinski Palace Cairo, Hyatt Regency Cairo West, and Steigenberger Pyramids Cairo.

  • No wording implying a Katb el Ketab or formal ceremony at this wedding.

One important thing from the handover: the previous session apparently reset while Claude was implementing the final batch, so we should not assume those last changes actually made it into the HTML until we inspect the current index.html.

Upload the current HTML/index.html here when we continue, and I’ll work from the real live version rather than reconstructing it from the transcript.


Du:

Eingefügter Text(1).txt
Dokument
this is the script:

ChatGPT:

Yes — I have the actual current HTML script now, so this is the version we should use as our source of truth from here onward.

I checked it against the changes you requested before the Claude session broke, and importantly: those final edits were not actually applied to this file.

The current script still has:

  • keep scrolling ▼ — the little arrow is still there.

  • When: “Starts at 4:00 PM” rather than guest arrival from 2:00 PM / celebration shortly after.

  • Where: still says “New Cairo, Cairo, Egypt,” which needs correcting to just Cairo, Egypt.

  • The downloaded calendar event also still says New Cairo and starts at 4:00 PM.

  • Dress code: still has the old “soft romantic tones — lavender, sage, dusty rose, and gold” wording.

  • Hotels: still uses the old short “Hotels” FAQ rather than the new “Where should I stay?” explanation covering New Cairo versus Giza/Pyramids.

  • Children, Parking, and Plus ones have not yet been added.

  • The RSVP is already correctly connected to Formspree at mgojkrve, with accept/decline, guest number, message, and asynchronous submission.

  • The photos are embedded directly into the HTML, so it remains a single-file website suitable for GitHub Pages.

  • The countdown currently targets 7 January 2027 at 4:00 PM Cairo time.

So we now have a clean baseline. I would not rebuild it from scratch; we should edit this exact version so we preserve the embedded photos, Egypt section, styling, Formspree RSVP, calendar function, and mobile behavior.


Du:

ok give me the adjusted script

ChatGPT:

Done. I updated the exact HTML you uploaded, preserving the embedded photos, styling, Formspree RSVP, mobile behavior, and existing sections.

The revised version now includes:

  • “Keep scrolling” with no arrow

  • When: Thursday, 7 January 2027; guest arrival from 2:00 PM; celebration begins shortly after; arrival-on-time note

  • Where: Seasons Country Club, KM 28 Cairo–Alexandria Desert Road, Cairo, Egypt — no incorrect “New Cairo”

  • Countdown changed from 4:00 PM to 2:00 PM Cairo time

  • “Add to Calendar” event also corrected to start at 2:00 PM and no longer says New Cairo

  • Your finalized Garden formal dress-code wording

  • New Children — 12+ FAQ

  • New Parking FAQ

  • New Plus ones FAQ

  • Expanded “Where should I stay?” section explaining New Cairo/New Administrative Capital versus Giza/Pyramids, including Helnan Landmark, Royal Inn Residence, Kempinski Palace Cairo, Hyatt Regency Cairo West, and Steigenberger Pyramids Cairo

  • Formspree endpoint mgojkrve remains intact, so the RSVP setup is preserved

  • Added proper spacing between the longer hotel paragraphs

I also syntax-checked the JavaScript after the edits.

The one requested change not contained in this HTML is the separate QR save-the-date image/card:
Tarek & Reem → Save the Date → QR code → “Scan for details and FAQs”, removing “Wedding Countdown Page.” That graphic is a separate asset from the website script.

index.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Tarek &amp; Reem &middot; 7 January 2027</title>
<meta property="og:title" content="Tarek &amp; Reem &middot; 7 January 2027">
<meta property="og:description" content="Together with their families, Tarek and Reem invite you to celebrate their wedding in Cairo.">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#4A1942">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Allura&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --cream:#F8F2E8;
    --cream-deep:#F1E8D8;
    --plum:#4A1942;
    --plum-soft:#6B3760;
    --sage:#7E8B62;
    --lavender:#B89BC9;
    --lavender-light:#E3D6EA;
    --gold:#B08D4F;
    --gold-light:#E4D2A1;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth; font-size:21px;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--plum);
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size:23px;
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  img{max-width:100%; display:block;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-size:16px;
    letter-spacing:.22em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--sage);
    font-weight:600;
    margin:0 0 .9rem;
  }
  .eyebrow.center{text-align:center;}
  .section-title{
    font-size:2.1rem;
    font-weight:500;
    font-style:italic;
    color:var(--plum);
    text-align:center;
    margin:0 0 2.6rem;
  }
  a{color:var(--plum-soft);}
  button{font-family:inherit;}
  :focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--gold); outline-offset:3px;}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:100vh;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    text-align:center;
    padding:5rem 1.5rem 3rem;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 45% at 12% 14%, rgba(184,155,201,0.55), transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 45% at 88% 10%, rgba(126,139,98,0.40), transparent 62%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 50% at 82% 92%, rgba(184,155,201,0.42), transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 8% 92%, rgba(126,139,98,0.32), transparent 60%),
      var(--cream);
  }

  .sprig{position:absolute; width:120px; opacity:.9; pointer-events:none;}
  .sprig.tl{top:18px; left:8px; transform:rotate(-8deg);}
  .sprig.br{bottom:18px; right:8px; transform:rotate(178deg);}

  .hero-content{position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:640px;}
  .names{
    font-family:'Allura', cursive;
    font-size:5.6rem;
    line-height:1;
    margin:0 0 .6rem;
    color:var(--plum);
  }
  .invite-line{
    font-style:italic;
    font-size:1.25rem;
    color:var(--plum-soft);
    margin:0 0 1.6rem;
  }
  .date-pill{
    display:inline-block;
    font-size:16.5px;
    letter-spacing:.16em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--plum);
    border-top:1px solid var(--gold);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);
    padding:.55rem 0;
    margin-bottom:2.6rem;
  }

  .countdown{display:flex; gap:.7rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .cd-box{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.55);
    border:1px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-radius:4px;
    width:78px;
    padding:.8rem .3rem .6rem;
  }
  .cd-num{
    font-size:2.1rem;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--plum);
    font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
  }
  .cd-label{
    font-size:14px;
    letter-spacing:.14em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--sage);
    margin-top:.2rem;
  }
  .cd-done{font-style:italic; font-size:1.3rem; color:var(--plum);}

  @media (max-width:500px){
    .names{font-size:3.6rem;}
    .invite-line{font-size:1.05rem;}
    .date-pill{font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.10em;}
    .cd-box{width:64px; padding:.6rem .2rem .5rem;}
    .cd-num{font-size:1.6rem;}
    .cd-label{font-size:11px;}
    .hero-content{padding:0 1rem;}
    .sprig{width:80px;}
  }

  .scroll-hint{
    position:absolute; bottom:22px; left:0; right:0;
    text-align:center; font-size:15.5px; letter-spacing:.18em;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--plum-soft); opacity:.7;
  }

  /* ---------- DIVIDERS ---------- */
  .divider{display:flex; justify-content:center; padding:2.2rem 0;}
  .divider svg{width:60px; height:60px; opacity:.85;}

  /* ---------- GENERIC SECTION ---------- */
  section{padding:1rem 1.5rem 4rem; max-width:980px; margin:0 auto;}

  .reveal{opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px); transition:opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;}
  .reveal.visible{opacity:1; transform:none;}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .reveal{opacity:1; transform:none;} }

  /* ---------- GALLERY ---------- */
  .gallery-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap:14px;
  }
  .gallery-grid figure{margin:0; position:relative; overflow:hidden; border-radius:3px;}
  .gallery-grid img{width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; aspect-ratio:3/4;}
  @media (max-width:760px){
    .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);}
  }

  /* ---------- DETAILS ---------- */
  .details-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap:1.6rem;
  }
  .detail-card{
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border:1px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-radius:6px;
    padding:1.8rem 1.5rem;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .detail-card h3{
    font-family:'Allura', cursive;
    font-size:1.9rem;
    color:var(--plum-soft);
    margin:0 0 .8rem;
    font-weight:400;
  }
  .detail-card p{margin:.25rem 0;}
  .muted{color:var(--plum-soft); font-size:19px;}
  .directions-btn{
    display:inline-block;
    margin-top:1rem;
    padding:.55rem 1.3rem;
    border:1px solid var(--plum);
    border-radius:30px;
    font-size:16.5px;
    letter-spacing:.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;
    color:var(--plum);
    background:none;
    cursor:pointer;
    font-family:inherit;
    transition:background .25s, color .25s;
  }
  .directions-btn:hover{background:var(--plum); color:var(--cream);}
  @media (max-width:760px){
    .details-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  }

  /* ---------- EGYPT ---------- */
  .egypt-intro{text-align:center; max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 2.6rem; font-style:italic; color:var(--plum-soft);}
  .egypt-icons{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr); gap:1.4rem;
    max-width:880px; margin:0 auto 2.4rem;
  }
  .egypt-icon{text-align:center;}
  .egypt-icon .badge{
    width:72px; height:72px; margin:0 auto .8rem;
    border:1px solid var(--gold); border-radius:50%;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    background:var(--cream-deep);
  }
  .egypt-icon svg{width:38px; height:38px;}
  .egypt-icon h4{font-family:'Allura', cursive; font-weight:400; font-size:1.5rem; margin:0 0 .3rem; color:var(--plum-soft);}
  .egypt-icon p{font-size:18px; color:var(--plum); margin:0; line-height:1.45;}
  .egypt-note{
    text-align:center; max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; font-style:italic;
    color:var(--plum-soft); font-size:19px; border-top:1px solid var(--gold-light); padding-top:1.4rem;
  }
  @media (max-width:760px){
    .egypt-icons{grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);}
  }

  /* ---------- FAQ ---------- */
  .faq-grid{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); gap:1.6rem;
    max-width:880px; margin:0 auto;
  }
  .faq-card{
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border:1px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-radius:6px;
    padding:1.6rem 1.7rem;
  }
  .faq-card h3{
    font-family:'Allura', cursive; font-weight:400; font-size:1.6rem;
    color:var(--plum-soft); margin:0 0 .5rem;
  }
  .faq-card p{margin:0; font-size:17px; line-height:1.5; color:var(--plum);}
  .faq-card p + p{margin-top:.8rem;}
  @media (max-width:760px){
    .faq-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  }

  /* ---------- RSVP ---------- */
  .rsvp-intro{text-align:center; max-width:480px; margin:0 auto 2.2rem; color:var(--plum-soft); font-style:italic;}
  form#rsvpForm{
    max-width:480px; margin:0 auto;
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border:1px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:2.2rem 2rem;
  }
  .field{margin-bottom:1.3rem;}
  .field label{
    display:block; font-size:16px; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--sage); margin-bottom:.4rem;
  }
  .field input[type=text], .field input[type=number], .field textarea{
    width:100%; font-family:'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size:19px;
    padding:.55rem .7rem; border:1px solid var(--lavender-light);
    border-radius:4px; background:#fff; color:var(--plum);
  }
  .field textarea{resize:vertical; min-height:80px;}
  .radio-row{display:flex; gap:1.3rem; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .radio-row label{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.45rem;
    text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; font-size:19px; color:var(--plum); cursor:pointer;
  }
  .submit-btn{
    width:100%; padding:.8rem; border:none; border-radius:30px;
    background:var(--plum); color:var(--cream); font-size:18px;
    letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer;
    transition:background .25s;
  }
  .submit-btn:hover{background:var(--plum-soft);}
  .submit-btn:disabled{opacity:.6; cursor:default;}
  #rsvpThanks{
    max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; text-align:center;
    background:var(--cream-deep); border:1px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-radius:8px; padding:2.4rem 2rem; font-style:italic; font-size:1.15rem;
  }
  #rsvpError{color:#9C3B3B; font-size:17px; margin-top:.6rem; text-align:center;}

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{
    text-align:center; padding:3.5rem 1.5rem 2.5rem;
    border-top:1px solid var(--gold-light);
  }
  footer .footer-names{font-family:'Allura', cursive; font-size:2.4rem; color:var(--plum); display:block; margin:.3rem 0;}
  footer .footer-meta{color:var(--plum-soft); font-size:17px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<section class="hero">
  <svg class="sprig tl" viewBox="0 0 120 150" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M10,10 C40,40 35,70 60,100 C75,118 85,128 92,134" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g transform="translate(22,27) rotate(-55) scale(0.85)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(33,49) rotate(50) scale(0.95)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(47,72) rotate(-48) scale(1.05)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(61,95) rotate(45) scale(1.1)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(76,114) rotate(-42) scale(1.15)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <circle cx="90" cy="128" r="2.6" fill="#B89BC9"/>
    <circle cx="96" cy="133" r="2.1" fill="#B89BC9" opacity=".82"/>
    <circle cx="84" cy="135" r="1.8" fill="#B89BC9" opacity=".7"/>
  </svg>
  <svg class="sprig br" viewBox="0 0 120 150" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M10,10 C40,40 35,70 60,100 C75,118 85,128 92,134" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g transform="translate(22,27) rotate(-55) scale(0.85)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(33,49) rotate(50) scale(0.95)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(47,72) rotate(-48) scale(1.05)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(61,95) rotate(45) scale(1.1)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <g transform="translate(76,114) rotate(-42) scale(1.15)"><path d="M0,0 Q4,-2.8 8,0 Q4,2.8 0,0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
    <circle cx="90" cy="128" r="2.6" fill="#B89BC9"/>
    <circle cx="96" cy="133" r="2.1" fill="#B89BC9" opacity=".82"/>
    <circle cx="84" cy="135" r="1.8" fill="#B89BC9" opacity=".7"/>
  </svg>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="eyebrow center">Together with their families</p>
    <h1 class="names">Tarek &amp; Reem</h1>
    <p class="invite-line">invite you to celebrate their wedding</p>
    <div class="date-pill">Thursday &middot; 7 January 2027 &middot; Cairo</div>
    <div class="countdown" id="countdown" aria-live="polite">
      <div class="cd-box"><div class="cd-num" id="cd-d">00</div><div class="cd-label">Days</div></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><div class="cd-num" id="cd-h">00</div><div class="cd-label">Hours</div></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><div class="cd-num" id="cd-m">00</div><div class="cd-label">Mins</div></div>
      <div class="cd-box"><div class="cd-num" id="cd-s">00</div><div class="cd-label">Secs</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">keep scrolling</div>
</section>

<div class="divider">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M5,50 C25,20 40,45 50,30 C60,45 75,20 95,50" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.3"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="24" r="3.5" fill="#B89BC9"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section class="gallery reveal">
  <p class="eyebrow center">A few of our moments</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Our Story, So Far</h2>

  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M5,50 C25,20 40,45 50,30 C60,45 75,20 95,50" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.3"/>

<section class="details reveal">
  <p class="eyebrow center">Save the date</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">The Celebration</h2>
  <div class="details-grid">
    <div class="detail-card">
      <h3>When</h3>
      <p><strong>Thursday, 7 January 2027</strong></p>
      <p class="muted">Guest arrival from 2:00 PM</p>
      <p class="muted">Celebration begins shortly after</p>
      <p class="muted">We recommend arriving on time to enjoy the full evening.</p>
      <button type="button" class="directions-btn" id="addCalendarBtn">Add to Calendar</button>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-card">
      <h3>Where</h3>
      <p><strong>Seasons Country Club</strong></p>
      <p class="muted">KM 28, Cairo&ndash;Alexandria Desert Road</p>
      <p class="muted">Cairo, Egypt</p>
      <a class="directions-btn" href="https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=Seasons+Country+Club+Km+28+Cairo+Alexandria+Desert+Road+Giza+Egypt&travelmode=driving" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Get Directions</a>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-card">
      <h3>Good to know</h3>
      <p class="muted">Travel, accommodation, dress code, parking, children and plus-ones &mdash; it's all in the FAQ below.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M5,50 C25,20 40,45 50,30 C60,45 75,20 95,50" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.3"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="24" r="3.5" fill="#B89BC9"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section class="egypt reveal">
  <p class="eyebrow center">A trip of a lifetime</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Come Experience Egypt</h2>
  <p class="egypt-intro">If you're flying in, make a journey of it. Cairo sits beside wonders older than Rome itself &mdash; and they're closer than you'd think.</p>

  <div class="egypt-icons">
    <div class="egypt-icon">
      <div class="badge">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" aria-hidden="true">
          <polygon points="12,46 22,24 32,46" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <polygon points="22,46 34,18 46,46" fill="none" stroke="#4A1942" stroke-width="1.8"/>
          <polygon points="38,46 46,30 54,46" fill="none" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <line x1="8" y1="46" x2="56" y2="46" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.4"/>
          <circle cx="48" cy="14" r="4" fill="#B89BC9" opacity=".8"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <h4>Giza Pyramids</h4>
      <p>Stand before the last surviving Wonder of the Ancient World.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="egypt-icon">
      <div class="badge">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M10,46 C10,46 14,30 20,28 C22,18 30,14 34,22 C40,20 44,28 42,34 C48,36 50,46 50,46 Z" fill="none" stroke="#4A1942" stroke-width="1.7"/>
          <line x1="6" y1="46" x2="56" y2="46" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.4"/>
          <circle cx="27" cy="24" r="1.6" fill="#4A1942"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <h4>The Great Sphinx</h4>
      <p>Carved from bedrock nearly 4,500 years ago.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="egypt-icon">
      <div class="badge">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M32,12 L32,42 L46,42 Z" fill="none" stroke="#4A1942" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="10" x2="32" y2="44" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1.4"/>
          <path d="M14,44 C20,40 26,40 32,44 C38,40 44,40 50,44" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <path d="M10,50 C18,46 26,46 32,50 C38,46 46,46 54,50" fill="none" stroke="#B89BC9" stroke-width="1.4" opacity=".8"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <h4>A Nile Sunset Sail</h4>
      <p>Drift down the river the old&#8209;fashioned way, by sail.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="egypt-icon">
      <div class="badge">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M26,14 L38,14 L40,22 L24,22 Z" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <path d="M24,22 C20,28 20,38 24,44 L40,44 C44,38 44,28 40,22 Z" fill="none" stroke="#4A1942" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="44" x2="32" y2="50" stroke="#4A1942" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <line x1="26" y1="50" x2="38" y2="50" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.6"/>
          <line x1="24" y1="30" x2="40" y2="30" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1.1" opacity=".7"/>
          <line x1="23" y1="36" x2="41" y2="36" stroke="#7E8B62" stroke-width="1.1" opacity=".7"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <h4>Khan el&#8209;Khalili</h4>
      <p>A bustling bazaar of spice and lantern light since the 1300s.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="egypt-note">Flying into Cairo (CAI)? We've added a few trip tips in the FAQ below.</p>
</section>

<div class="divider">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M5,50 C25,20 40,45 50,30 C60,45 75,20 95,50" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.3"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="24" r="3.5" fill="#B89BC9"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section class="faq reveal">
  <p class="eyebrow center">Good to know</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">FAQ</h2>
  <div class="faq-grid">
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Where should I stay?</h3>
      <p>Cairo is a large and spread-out city, so location matters. Some smaller pre-wedding gatherings will take place around the New Administrative Capital / New Cairo area, while the wedding celebration will be closer to the Pyramids/Giza area.</p>
      <p>For guests staying in New Cairo, <a href="https://www.booking.com/hotel/eg/landmark-new-cairo.de.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Helnan Landmark Hotel</a> is a convenient option. A more budget-friendly choice nearby is <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/place/?q=place_id:ChIJb_oXBWY9WBQRIUSZTdsFk_Y" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Royal Inn Residence</a>. If you&rsquo;re looking for something fancier, <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/place/?q=place_id:ChIJ01k5-GY9WBQRtkS-oeN0qlA" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Kempinski Palace Cairo</a> is a five-star option in the same area.</p>
      <p>For the wedding night itself, staying closer to the Pyramids/Giza area may make the journey easier; Hyatt Regency Cairo West and Steigenberger Pyramids Cairo are options nearby.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Getting there</h3>
      <p>Uber works well throughout Cairo and is the easiest way to reach the venue. If you'd rather have a private driver for the day, let us know &mdash; we can recommend a trusted car company.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Dress code</h3>
      <p>Garden formal. We kindly ask guests to avoid white, ivory, cream, champagne, and very pale shades that may photograph as white &mdash; we&rsquo;ll be saving those for the bride :).</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Children</h3>
      <p>As much as we love your little ones, we kindly ask that our wedding celebration be limited to guests aged 12 and above. Thank you for understanding.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Parking</h3>
      <p>Parking is available at the venue. Please follow the venue staff&rsquo;s directions when you arrive.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Plus ones</h3>
      <p>Because of venue capacity, we kindly ask guests to attend with the people listed on their invitation.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-card">
      <h3>Weather</h3>
      <p>Early January in Cairo is mild and sunny &mdash; expect highs around 19&deg;C (66&deg;F) by day, cooling to about 9&deg;C (48&deg;F) once the sun sets. A light jacket or wrap for the evening is a good idea.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M5,50 C25,20 40,45 50,30 C60,45 75,20 95,50" fill="none" stroke="#B08D4F" stroke-width="1.3"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="24" r="3.5" fill="#B89BC9"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section class="rsvp reveal">
  <p class="eyebrow center">Kindly reply</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">RSVP</h2>
  <p class="rsvp-intro">We can't wait to celebrate with you &mdash; let us know if you'll be there.</p>

  <form id="rsvpForm" action="https://formspree.io/f/mgojkrve" method="POST" novalidate>
    <div class="field">
      <label for="rName">Your name</label>
      <input type="text" id="rName" name="name" required>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Will you join us?</label>
      <div class="radio-row">
        <label><input type="radio" name="attending" value="Joyfully accepts" checked> Joyfully accepts</label>
        <label><input type="radio" name="attending" value="Regretfully declines"> Regretfully declines</label>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label for="rGuests">Number of guests (incl. you)</label>
      <input type="number" id="rGuests" name="guests" min="1" max="8" value="1">
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label for="rMsg">Message to the couple (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="rMsg" name="message"></textarea>
    </div>
    <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New wedding RSVP">
    <button type="submit" class="submit-btn" id="rsvpSubmitBtn">Send RSVP</button>
    <div id="rsvpError"></div>
  </form>

  <div id="rsvpThanks" hidden></div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p class="muted" style="font-style:italic;">With all our love,</p>
  <span class="footer-names">Tarek &amp; Reem</span>
  <p class="footer-meta">Cairo &middot; 7 January 2027</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // ---- Countdown ----
  // 7 Jan 2027, 2:00 PM Cairo time (UTC+2) == 12:00 UTC. Using Date.UTC avoids
  // any cross-browser quirks with parsing ISO offset strings.
  var target = Date.UTC(2027, 0, 7, 12, 0, 0);
  function pad(n){ return String(n).padStart(2,'0'); }
  function tick(){
    var now = Date.now();
    var diff = target - now;
    var box = document.getElementById('countdown');
    if(diff <= 0){
      box.innerHTML = '<div class="cd-done">Today is the day! With love, Tarek &amp; Reem.</div>';
      clearInterval(timer);
      return;
    }
    var s = Math.floor(diff/1000);
    var d = Math.floor(s/86400); s -= d*86400;
    var h = Math.floor(s/3600); s -= h*3600;
    var m = Math.floor(s/60); s -= m*60;
    document.getElementById('cd-d').textContent = pad(d);
    document.getElementById('cd-h').textContent = pad(h);
    document.getElementById('cd-m').textContent = pad(m);
    document.getElementById('cd-s').textContent = pad(s);
  }
  tick();
  var timer = setInterval(tick, 1000);

  // ---- Add to calendar (.ics download) ----
  function icsStamp(d){
    function p(n){ return String(n).padStart(2,'0'); }
    return d.getUTCFullYear() + p(d.getUTCMonth()+1) + p(d.getUTCDate()) + 'T' + p(d.getUTCHours()) + p(d.getUTCMinutes()) + p(d.getUTCSeconds()) + 'Z';
  }
  document.getElementById('addCalendarBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){
    var lines = [
      'BEGIN:VCALENDAR',
      'VERSION:2.0',
      'PRODID:-//Tarek and Reem Wedding//EN',
      'BEGIN:VEVENT',
      'UID:tarek-reem-wedding-2027-01-07@invite',
      'DTSTAMP:' + icsStamp(new Date()),
      'DTSTART:20270107T120000Z',
      'DTEND:20270107T210000Z',
      'SUMMARY:Tarek and Reem - Wedding',
      'LOCATION:Seasons Country Club - KM 28 Cairo-Alexandria Desert Road - Cairo - Egypt',
      'DESCRIPTION:Guest arrival from 2:00 PM. Celebration begins shortly after. Please arrive on time to enjoy the full evening.',
      'END:VEVENT',
      'END:VCALENDAR'
    ];
    var blob = new Blob([lines.join('\r\n')], { type: 'text/calendar;charset=utf-8' });
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'tarek-and-reem-wedding.ics';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  // ---- Scroll reveal ----
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
    var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
    }, {threshold:0.15});
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){ obs.observe(el); });
  } else {
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('visible'); });
  }

  // ---- RSVP submit (Formspree) ----
  var form = document.getElementById('rsvpForm');
  form.addEventListener('submit', async function(ev){
    ev.preventDefault();
    var errEl = document.getElementById('rsvpError');
    errEl.textContent = '';
    var name = document.getElementById('rName').value.trim();
    if(!name){ errEl.textContent = 'Please enter your name.'; return; }
    var attending = form.querySelector('input[name="attending"]:checked').value;
    var btn = document.getElementById('rsvpSubmitBtn');
    btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
    try{
      var resp = await fetch(form.action, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' },
        body: new FormData(form)
      });
      if(!resp.ok){ throw new Error('Formspree error ' + resp.status); }
      form.hidden = true;
      var thanks = document.getElementById('rsvpThanks');
      thanks.hidden = false;
      thanks.textContent = attending === 'Joyfully accepts'
        ? ('Thank you, ' + name + '! We\'ve got your reply and can\'t wait to celebrate with you.')
        : ('Thank you, ' + name + ' \u2014 we\'ll miss you, but we appreciate you letting us know.');
    } catch(err){
      errEl.textContent = "Something went wrong sending your RSVP \u2014 please try again in a moment.";
      btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Send RSVP';
    }
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
